title: AI-Designed Antibiotic Peptides Matched a Last-Resort Drug in Mice
description: Penn's generative AI ApexGO edited antimicrobial peptides mined from extinct animals into new candidates. In the lab, 85% halted bacterial growth and 72% beat their templates; in an infected-mouse model two rivaled the last-resort antibiotic polymyxin B. We look at why the model's optimism held up in the wet lab this time — a story about data design.
